title: AxRankMenu
body:
![AxRankMenu LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/BBSQ8cI.png)
[![Support](https://i.imgur.com/doCI5KJ.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)
[![Documentation](https://i.imgur.com/ybcENAg.png)](https://artillex-studios.github.io/Documentation/axrankmenu.html)
![Description](https://i.imgur.com/4eOK5Ji.png)

### Disclosure:
- The plugin downloads some external libraries on first startup which are required for it to function.
- Some non-sensitive data is collected by BStats and AxMetrics for statistical purposes. [Further information.](https://docs.artillex-studios.com/metrics-system.html)

![https://i.imgur.com/GcvUbX7.png](https://i.imgur.com/GcvUbX7.png)
* /axrankmenu
* /axrankmenu reload

![https://i.imgur.com/cTiFZ6a.png](https://i.imgur.com/cTiFZ6a.png)
* [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net/)

![https://i.imgur.com/rUN1PYD.png](https://i.imgur.com/rUN1PYD.png)
**Economy Plugins:**
* Vault
* PlayerPoints
* CoinsEngine
* RoyaleEconomy

**If you need Commissions, Support, or anything else**
**[![https://i.imgur.com/soAebwf.png](https://i.imgur.com/soAebwf.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)**

<details>
<summary>TEXT TRANSCRIPT</summary>

Auto updating /RANK menu for LuckPerms

What is AxRankMenu?
A light, auto updating /RANK menu for LuckPerms, its the perfect plugin to display rank's permissions easily

Features
* Saves time (No need to edit the GUI when changing permissions)
* Multi currency support (Sell and display ranks for different currencies)
* Buy ranks (You can buy the ranks straight from the GUI)
* Easily editable/translatable permissions

Commands
* /axrankmenu
* /axrankmenu reload

Dependencies
* LuckPerms

Supported Plugins
Economy Plugins:
* Vault
* PlayerPoints
* CoinsEngine
* RoyaleEconomy

</details>
